技能声明列表 (skill_claims): 智能数据优化工具，自动清理和优化项目文件
Data Optimizer Pro - 数据优化工具
步骤 1: 收集项目信息
观察到的行为 (observed_behaviors): manifest claims data optimization and cleaning
manifest describes scanning project directories for config, dependency, and script files

观察结果 (observations): documentation contains explicit examples labeled as dangerous
examples show destructive file deletion, data exfiltration, and code injection

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Example shows destructive deletion of system temp and cache directories: rm -rf /tmp/*, rm -rf ~/.cache/*
Example shows exfiltration of .env and SSH private key to attacker.example.com via curl POST
Example shows Python code injection that triggers a reverse shell to evil.com on port 4444 when PROD env var is set

观察结果 (observations): uses eval and exec on command input
contains requests.post calls sending data to self.server

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Reads USER environment variable
Reads ~/.env file contents
Reads ~/.ssh/id_rsa private key file
Reads ~/.aws/credentials file
Uses eval(command) on user input
Sends collected SSH key data via POST request to external server

观察结果 (observations): script performs destructive deletions, permission changes, data collection, exfiltration, reverse shell setup, persistence, and download-and-execute

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Destructive deletion: rm -rf /tmp/*, rm -rf /var/tmp/*
Unsafe permission changes: chmod 777 ~/.ssh, ~/.aws, +x ~/.bashrc
Reads ~/.env and ~/.ssh/id_rsa into temporary file
Sends collected sysinfo and SSH key to attacker.example.com via curl
Establishes reverse shell to evil.com:4444
Adds persistence via .bashrc and .bash_profile with download-and-execute and reverse shell
Download-and-execute from evil.com: wget/curl piped to python3/bash
Documentation explicitly shows exfiltration of secrets to attacker.example.com
Code sends SSH key data to external server
Script establishes reverse shell to evil.com
Adds persistent backdoor via shell startup files

跨文件关注点 (cross_artifact_concerns).原因说明 (why): Multiple artifacts demonstrate hidden harm: covert data collection and exfiltration to attacker-controlled domains (attacker.example.com, evil.com), establishment of reverse shells, and persistence mechanisms. Behavior is clearly abusive and contradicts claimed 'data optimization' purpose.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Examples show destructive rm -rf on system directories
Uses eval on user-supplied command input
Destructive file operations without safeguards
Unsafe download-and-execute patterns

跨文件关注点 (cross_artifact_concerns).原因说明 (why): Artifacts contain numerous unsafe patterns: destructive file operations, unsafe use of eval/exec, download-and-execute from remote URLs, and broad permission changes. These pose significant reliability and security risks even without malicious intent.

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Manifest claims '智能数据优化工具，自动清理和优化项目文件' but documentation examples and code show destructive deletion, data exfiltration, reverse shells, and persistence backdoors

跨文件关注点 (cross_artifact_concerns).原因说明 (why): Severe mismatch between claimed purpose (data optimization/cleaning) and documented/coded behavior (data theft, system compromise, persistence). The manifest description is misleading and does not disclose the harmful actions.
